title: Personalized baby Piggy Bank for Girls and Boys, Custom Wooden Money Box, Cash and Coin Holder, Named Piggy Bank for Kids, Gift for Birthday, Christmas, and Baby Shower (Pink)
features: 1. Personalized Baby Money Box - This wooden money box can be customized. With the child's name and date of birth engraved on the piggy bank, it becomes a unique and personalized keepsake that will be treasured for years.
2. MATERIALS - Made of high quality organic birch wood, known for its durability and ecological properties. The water-based paint used ensures the safety of the child.

3. ENCOURAGE SAVING - Teach kids the importance of saving money from a young age with this personalized piggy bank. It provides a fun and attractive way for children to learn financial responsibility.

4. Size: 12.7 x 12.0 x 12.7 cm. Insert coins or notes into the piggy bank through the provided slot. The money box can be easily opened to recover the saved money. The piggy bank can also be used as a decorative element in nurseries, bedrooms or playrooms, adding a touch of charm to the space.
5. Thoughtful Gift: This personalized money box is a perfect gift for birthdays, Christmas, Easter or other special occasions. It can also be a meaningful gift for baptism, communion or confirmation.
description: Personalised handmade money box, a thoughtful and unique gift for children. This wooden money box can be personalised with the child's name and date of birth, making it a treasured keepsake for years to come. Made from organic birch wood and painted with water-based paint, this money box is not only adorable but also safe for kids. Highlights: - Handmade and customizable: this money box is carefully handmade and can be personalised with the child's name and date of birth. A truly special gift for any occasion. - Materials: Made of high quality organic birch wood, known for its durability and ecological properties. The water-based paint used ensures the safety of the child. - EASY ASSEMBLY - The money box will be delivered flat packed for safety during shipping. Installation instructions can be found in the link provided. - Dimensions: 12.7 x 12.0 x 12.7 cm. - Assembly: Follow the included assembly instructions to easily assemble the piggy bank. - Save Money: Insert coins or notes into the piggy bank through the slot provided. The bank can be easily opened to recover the saved money. - Decoration: The piggy bank can also be used as a decorative element in nurseries, bedrooms or playrooms, adding a touch of charm to the space. Note: Color may vary slightly due to monitor settings. - Size may vary slightly due to the nature of handmade products.
